title: Failed generate C++ code with unique casez when "--assert" argument

features.name: unique casez with don't-care literal in patterns
features.description: Code should include a unique casez statement with 1'b? don't-care bits in case patterns

features.name: localparam with don't-care literal value

features.name: concatenation in casez pattern with don't-care bits

features.name: localparam don't-care used in casez pattern concatenation
